scenario_title: Deterministic RN state reset + synchronized golden-records list render
runner_selection_rationale: DL-12 Detox-REQUIRED category: trigger #2 (deterministic app state reset / seeded state / internal app control unavailable through black-box user actions) + trigger #4 (precise waiting on RN state to avoid flake). Maestro cannot provide deterministic state reset or RN-bridge synchronized waits, so Maestro-only is invalid per the DL-12 conflict policy. This is a pure Detox-required flow with NO separate black-box acceptance requirement, so Detox-only is correct here (not the high-risk-Detox-only-rejected case).

required_app_state.reset: deterministic device.launchApp({delete:true}) + reloadReactNative per scenario (Detox internal control)

app_build_ref: apps/mobile built RN binary (pending-live: no build available in this env)
flake_policy_ref: DL-10/DL-12: deterministic failure hard-blocks; rerun is diagnostic only, never erases a prior failure
evidence_consumer: verification runner / build / ship / I-23 end-to-end witness
//detox-only-justification: Pure Detox-required flow (state reset + precise wait); no separate black-box acceptance requirement, so DL-12 'Detox-only insufficient for high-risk user-visible' does not apply (high_risk_user_visible=false).
